headlines.text: Trump Claims Iran Asked for Ceasefire; Iran Says Absolutely Not
Supreme Court Hears Birthright Citizenship Case as Trump Shows Up in Person
Gas Hits $4.06 a Gallon, Highest Since 2022
SpaceX Confidentially Files for IPO at $1.75 Trillion Valuation
Tiger Woods Pleads Not Guilty to DUI, Checks Into Treatment Before Masters
Stocks Rally on Iran War-End Hopes; Dow Up Over 400 Points
IRGC Threatens to Strike Nvidia, Apple, Microsoft and Google Facilities
Trump Calls NATO a Paper Tiger, Floats Withdrawal in National Address Tonight
Israeli Missiles Hit Tehran Pharmaceutical Factory; WHO Office Windows Shattered
North Korean Hackers Breached Axios Software in Supply Chain Attack, Google Says

breaking.text: Trump to address nation at 9 p.m. ET tonight on Iran war status

stories.hed: Trump Says Iran Asked for a Ceasefire; Iran Says That Never Happened
stories.dek: Trump claimed on Truth Social that Iran is begging for a deal and the war could wrap up in two to three weeks — Iran's foreign ministry responded by denying everything and saying they have 'zero' trust in Washington. Meanwhile, Iran fired what one Israeli official called 'the most significant strike since day one' at Tel Aviv, which is a weird way to say you want to stop fighting.

stories.hed: SpaceX Confidentially Files for IPO Targeting $1.75 Trillion Valuation
stories.dek: Elon Musk's rocket and satellite company filed confidentially with the SEC today, putting it on track for a June listing that could be the largest IPO in human history — blowing past Saudi Aramco's prior record. OpenAI and Anthropic are reportedly watching from the waiting room.

stories.hed: Supreme Court Hears Birthright Citizenship Case; Trump Attends in Person
stories.dek: In what legal scholars are calling an unprecedented move, Trump sat in on oral arguments over his executive order to restrict birthright citizenship — the first sitting president to attend a Supreme Court argument. Multiple justices pressed the administration hard on its reading of the 14th Amendment, suggesting the president may not love what he came to watch.

stories.hed: Tiger Woods Pleads Not Guilty to DUI, Will Skip Masters and Seek Treatment
stories.dek: Five days after his Land Rover flipped on Jupiter Island — with hydrocodone in his pocket and no urine test provided to police — Woods entered a not guilty plea via his lawyers and announced he is stepping away from golf indefinitely to focus on his health. He will miss the Masters for the second straight year, which is statistically becoming a tradition.

stories.hed: Trump Told NATO Allies to 'Build Up Some Delayed Courage' and Patrol the Strait Themselves
stories.dek: After European allies declined to join a war they were not consulted on, Trump told them to 'just TAKE' the Strait of Hormuz and stop relying on U.S. protection — while simultaneously threatening to pull the U.S. out of NATO entirely. Analysts note this is a bold strategy for a man currently asking those same allies for help.

markets.context: Markets rallied on hopes the Iran war is nearing its end after Trump hinted at a wind-down, while oil pulled back and gold hit new highs as investors hedged both outcomes simultaneously.

gas.note: Up over a dollar since Feb. 28 — turns out starting a war near 20% of the world's oil supply has consequences.

popCulture.hed: Tiger Woods Arrested for DUI, Checks Into Treatment Days Before Masters
popCulture.dek: Woods was found with hydrocodone in his pocket and bloodshot eyes after his Land Rover flipped on Jupiter Island on March 27 — he pleaded not guilty this week and announced he is stepping away from golf to seek treatment. The PGA Tour called him 'a legend,' which is what you say when you have nothing else to say.

genZ.definition: A TikTok meme featuring a skeleton frantically banging a shield that exploded in early 2026 as shorthand for chaotic, overwhelming, or impossible-to-control situations — think war, gas prices, and your group chat when someone suggests brunch. It functions as a visual stand-in for 'this is fine' energy when things are clearly not fine.
genZ.usage: Trump checking the Iran situation: skeleton banging shield. Markets rallying on 'maybe the war ends soon' vibes: skeleton banging shield. Iran denying they asked for a ceasefire five minutes after Trump said they did: two skeletons, both banging shields.

tldr: Day 33 of the US-Israel war on Iran featured Trump claiming a ceasefire request that Iran flatly denied, gas topping $4 a gallon, SpaceX filing for the biggest IPO in history, and the Supreme Court getting an uninvited presidential audience. Tiger Woods also checked into treatment, because even off-war days are busy.
